D1_source_reachability.details: Real HTTP HEAD/GET checks performed 2026-05-18T19:43Z. anwarshaikhecon.org (cited as primary on all 4 series) DOES NOT RESOLVE: getaddrinfo failure on both http:// and https://. Internet Archive snapshot 2024-03-11 exists and a local copy of the underlying Appendix5_DATALRprices.xlsx is present in SalvagedInputs/book_data/ShaikhChoppedTables/. Per template, primary URL is reclassified as 'offline-archival' for adequacy purposes. MeasuringWorth: 200 OK (redirects /gold/ -> /datasets/gold/ and /exchangepound/ -> /datasets/exchangepound/; URLs in registry must be updated). BLS download.bls.gov: 200 OK; BLS public API confirms WPS00000000 frozen at 1974, WPU00000000 live through 2026-04. NBER macrohistory: 200 OK (auto-redirects to data.nber.org). LBMA: 200 OK. ONS PLLU (3 series): persistent 502 Bad Gateway from CDN on both HEAD and GET with multiple UAs -> marked 'unverified-rate-limited' (not failed; series is still published).

D2_year_coverage.details: Book-period coverage 100% for all 4 series (Jastram print tables + DATALRprices local fallback). Extension coverage: BLS WPU00000000 live through 2026-04 covers US WPI extension fully; MeasuringWorth covers gold through (at least) 2010 plus the WW2 wartime UK suspension is interpolated by MeasuringWorth and is acknowledged in S503 open_questions. ONS PLLU is currently 502 at our IP but is still actively published by ONS (the timeseries identifier exists); treat as recoverable. -2 reflects the ONS reachability uncertainty pending re-probe + the wartime UK gold interpolation needing explicit treatment at ingestion.

D3_license_compatibility.details: All sources public/academic: Jastram (1977) print citation; MeasuringWorth (Officer & Williamson) explicit scholarly-use license; BLS PPI public-domain; NBER macrohistory public; UK ONS PLLU OGL-licensed; LBMA Gold Price PM published with non-commercial scholarly use permitted. No paywalled or Morningstar/Ibbotson-type commercial gates in scope. Shaikh's DATALRprices spreadsheet is academic posting by the author; local copy in SalvagedInputs/ is in-scope per project terms.

D4_units_consistency.details: All 4 series carry explicit primary_source.units = 'index, 1930 = 100'. Extension candidates carry source units (BLS 1982=100, ONS 2015=100, MeasuringWorth currency/oz) with explicit rebase-to-1930=100 instructions. S503 and S504 are formula series with both p' (dimensionless ratio rebased to 1930=100) and pG (1930=100 index) plotted on the same log axis; units are internally consistent.

D5_extension_feasibility.details: S502 extension feasible: BLS WPU00000000 live (covers US WPI 2011+); ONS PLLU still published (UK leg). S501 is a historical slice (1790-1940) -> no extension needed; covered by S502. S503/S504 are formula series -> Phase 3 dossiers correctly document the No-Lazy-Splices-on-Derived-Quantities rule and specify recomputation from extended WPI + extended gold price components. The 2 deducted points reflect that (a) the WPS->WPU code bridge is documented but not yet operationalized in a loader, and (b) the LBMA post-2015 Gold Price reform requires an overlap-anchor calibration not yet specified.

D6_no_proxy_compliance.details: All substitutions disclosed: BLS WPS->WPU code transition flagged in S502/S504 concerns; LBMA reform (March 2015) flagged in S503/S504; MeasuringWorth-as-canonical correction (over CD2's COMEX/LBMA mis-attribution for S504, and CD2's BLS-PPI mis-attribution for S503 UK gold price) explicitly documented in methodology_notes. Wartime UK gold-market suspension and possible MeasuringWorth interpolation flagged as an open question, not silently treated as raw data. No undisclosed proxies.

per_series.name: US and UK Wholesale Price Indexes, 1790-1940

proposed_substitute.primary: SalvagedInputs/book_data/ShaikhChoppedTables/Appendix5_DATALRprices.xlsx (local copy) + Jastram (1977) print tables 2 and 7 as authoritative back-stop
proposed_substitute.rationale: anwarshaikhecon.org DNS does not resolve (verified 2026-05-18). Local copy of DATALRprices.xlsx and IA snapshot both confirmed reachable. Per decision 0005, anwarshaikhecon.org companion is to be hosted in SalvagedInputs/ with IA citation.

remediation: Update primary_source.url in registry to local SalvagedInputs path + IA snapshot URL
S501 is a chronological slice of S502; tag in registry as derived-from-S502 to enforce single-loader policy

per_series.name: US and UK Wholesale Price Indexes, 1790-2010

proposed_substitute.extension_us: BLS WPU00000000 via download.bls.gov/pub/time.series/wp/wp.data.0.Current (200 OK; legacy WPS00000000 is frozen at 1974 per BLS public API; confirmed 2026-05-18)
proposed_substitute.extension_uk: ONS PLLU via ons.gov.uk/economy/inflationandpriceindices/timeseries/pllu (currently returning 502 from CDN; series remains officially published — retry from a non-blocked IP)
proposed_substitute.rationale: Companion site dead; underlying sources live (US) and recoverable (UK).

remediation: Update registry URLs: drop http://www.bls.gov/ppi/data.htm# (redirects to /ppi/home.htm) in favor of api.bls.gov/publicAPI/v2/timeseries/data/WPU00000000
Replace WPS00000000 -> WPU00000000 identifier in S502 extension_candidates (Phase 3 already flagged in concerns)
Document ONS PLLU 502 condition; flag for re-probe before Phase 5 ingestion (server-side rate-limiting is intermittent)

per_series.name: UK WPI in Gold and UK Gold Price

proposed_substitute.primary: MeasuringWorth gold price at https://www.measuringworth.com/datasets/gold/ (final URL after /gold/ -> /datasets/gold/ redirect; 200 OK 2026-05-18)
proposed_substitute.fx_bridge: Officer & Williamson dollar-pound exchange rate at https://www.measuringworth.com/datasets/exchangepound/ (200 OK; URL reorganised same way)
proposed_substitute.wpi_uk: ONS PLLU (502 transient; series still published)
proposed_substitute.wartime_caveat: MeasuringWorth UK gold price 1939-1945 is documented by Officer/Williamson as interpolated due to wartime market suspension; flag at ingestion with provenance marker, do NOT treat as raw observations.
proposed_substitute.extension_post_2010: Compute p'_UK = ONS_PLLU / pG_UK with pG_UK from LBMA Gold Price PM (USD) / BoE XUDLGBD spot FX (200 OK on LBMA); recompute the ratio per No-Lazy-Splices rule, do not splice p' directly.

proxy_flags: 1939-1945 UK gold price likely interpolated by MeasuringWorth (Officer/Williamson note); must be marked as imputed at ingestion, not raw
remediation: Add exchangepound dataset URL as a second primary_source entry (FX is structural to S503, not just an extension concern)
Add wartime-interpolation provenance flag to 1939-1945 observations in the loader

per_series.name: US WPI in Gold and US Gold Price

proposed_substitute.primary: MeasuringWorth gold price at https://www.measuringworth.com/datasets/gold/ (200 OK; redirect from /gold/)
proposed_substitute.wpi_us: BLS WPU00000000 via api.bls.gov/publicAPI/v1/timeseries/data/WPU00000000 (verified live; latest obs 2026-04, val=283.764)
proposed_substitute.extension_post_2010: Compute p'_US = BLS_WPU00000000 / pG_US with pG_US from LBMA Gold Price PM USD (200 OK); recompute ratio per No-Lazy-Splices rule.
proposed_substitute.comex_lbma_clarification: CD2 listed COMEX/LBMA as primary; corrected per Appendix 5.2 to MeasuringWorth as canonical (which uses LBMA London Fix as underlying). Phase 3 dossier corrects this. Confirmed.

remediation: Replace BLS extension identifier WPS00000000 -> WPU00000000 (WPS is verified frozen at 1974 via BLS API 2026-05-18)
Document LBMA Gold Price reform (March 2015) as a splice-point requiring overlap-anchor calibration in the extension loader

chapter_level_recommendations: Ratify Phase 3 S503 source correction: UK gold-price extension is MeasuringWorth + Officer FX, NOT BLS PPI (CD2 S024 had this wrong).
Ratify Phase 3 S504 source correction: canonical source is MeasuringWorth (Officer & Williamson 'The Price of Gold, 1257-2010'), with COMEX/LBMA acknowledged as the underlying London Fix only.

anwarshaikhecon.org companion site is verified DEAD (DNS does not resolve, 2026-05-18); promote the local SalvagedInputs DATALRprices.xlsx to canonical primary file for all 4 Ch5 series with Internet Archive snapshot 2024-03-11 as web citation. This matches decision 0005 reference guidance.
BLS WPS00000000 identifier is verified frozen at 1974 via BLS public API; the WPS->WPU bridge is no longer optional — registry must point to WPU00000000 for S502 and S504 extensions.
MeasuringWorth URL reorganisation: /gold/ -> /datasets/gold/ and /exchangepound/ -> /datasets/exchangepound/ (server-side 301/auto-redirect); update registry primary_source.url for S503 and S504.
S501 should be tagged in the registry as a chronological view of S502 to enforce a single-loader policy and prevent divergent re-pulls.
open_questions: ONS PLLU returns persistent 502 from our checker IP. Series is still actively published by ONS; recommend re-probe from a different network before Phase 5 ingestion, or fall back to ONS bulk MM22 dataset download.
1939-1945 UK gold-price observations in MeasuringWorth are interpolated due to wartime market suspension; need explicit provenance marker in loader output (not silent).

Frequency convention (annual average vs. year-end) is not specified in Shaikh's Appendix 5.2; Officer/Williamson default (annual averages) is the working assumption — confirm at ingestion against DATALRprices.xlsx values.
Decide 'Jastram-faithful' vs. 'modern best-vintage' (Officer/Williamson historical) variant policy for pre-1900 segments — see S501 open_question; defer to ingestion design.
